threshold_rules.strong_observe: final_score >= 77; high evidence; proxy risk none/low; capped confidence >= 0.55; momentum and liquidity available
threshold_rules.moderate_observe: final_score >= 55; high/medium evidence; capped confidence >= 0.40; momentum or liquidity available
threshold_rules.weak_observe: final_score >= 35; usable evidence and at least one market observation
threshold_rules.insufficient: below calibrated gates, unavailable mapping, or insufficient usable evidence

calibration_notes: Score components are persisted per pool for audit.
Magnitude and market confirmation separate direct-evidence pools that previously shared one coarse score.
Proxy and missing-data penalties prevent coverage quantity from becoming strong evidence.
